levels.title: Foundation
levels.subtitle: A1 from zero
levels.description: Start speaking from the first tiny patterns.

levels.title: A1 Core
levels.subtitle: A1 daily survival and output
levels.description: Lessons 61-100: routines, requests, city life, service encounters, and A1 output confidence.

levels.title: A2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: A1 to A2 transition
levels.description: Lessons 101-150: past narration, richer plans, service language, comparisons, reasons, and early A2 output.

levels.title: A2 Core
levels.subtitle: Strong practical A2
levels.description: Lessons 151-200: connected stories, messages, service encounters, simple opinions, short texts, and A2 output readiness.

levels.title: B1 Bridge
levels.subtitle: A2 to B1 bridge
levels.description: Lessons 201-260: connected opinions, past stories, discussion repair, summaries, polite disagreement, and B1 speaking stamina.

levels.title: B1 Core
levels.subtitle: Balanced B1 Spanish
levels.description: Lessons 261-320: richer output, native-style dialogues, summaries, article reactions, writing, discussion, and B2 readiness.

levels.title: B2 Bridge
levels.subtitle: B1 to B2 bridge
levels.description: Lessons 321-380: nuanced argument, synthesis, abstract topics, policy discussion, professional output, and B2 reasoning.

levels.title: B2 Core
levels.subtitle: Confident B2 Spanish
levels.description: Native-style B2 work: synthesis, debate, professional output, nuanced writing, and independent self-correction.
